title: MP PAT 2026 Admit Card
post_name: MPESB Pre Agriculture Test PAT Examination 2026 Download Admit Card
organization_full_name: Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board MPESB

fees.B.Sc. AG: Passed 10+2 (Intermediate) with PCB or Agriculture Group Subjects in Any Recognized Board in India. For More Details Kindly See the Notification No Age Limit in PAT Admission 2022.

fee_payment_method: Pay the Exam Fee Through Cash at MP Online Authorized Kiosk Center or Debit/Credit or Net Banking Mode.
how_to_apply: Madhya Pradesh MP ESB PEB Vyapam Are Released the Admission Notification for Pre Agriculture Test PAT 2026 Candidate Can Apply Between 24 March 2026 to 07 April 2026
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Admission Application Form in MP ESB PAT Admission 2026.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
